title: MuehMueh
description:
modpack for people who enjoys building,
it includes plenty of usefull building blocks for you to build your dream build.
body:
**MODPACK WITH PLENTY OF QOL AND MULTIPLAYER EXPERIENCE WITHOUT CREATING A SERVER**

                                     -FEATURES-
  **ESSENTIAL MOD GIVES EASY ACCESS TO MULTIPLAYER**


-Animal Feeding Trough that will help you feed the animals by putting their food in it.

-Knowledge Book for you to help out a friend by trading EXP around if needed.

-Enchanting Tweaks to make it less costly and easier.

-A LOT OF FURNITURES and peculiar things for you to build with.

-Special Mob Captain will sometime spawn instead of normal mob that will drop special illegal enchantment.

-Ore Growth allows you to create a ore farm by putting down Ore Blocks.

-Plasmo Voice for you to have proximity chat ingame.

-Universal Graves gives you a grave at where you died so you can pick up your item with CROUCH + RIGHT CLICK.




                        -HOPE YOU GUYS HAVE FUN WITH THE MODPACK-
